docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD, EMILY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHARETTE, MICHELLE $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,150.00, $3000 IN INSTALLMENTS FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $250.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON FEB-15-2019 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 SERVED NOV-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHARETTE, MICHELLE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF EMILY FORD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHELLE CHARETTE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FORD, EMILY AS TO DEFENDANT CHARETTE, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT CHARETTE, MICHELLE
